captures.response_content_type: text/event-stream (SSE; markdown streamed into .markdown-body, 'thinking' phase '思考结束')
captures.success_response_wire_sample: Body not directly readable (Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard). POST /chatglm/backend-api/assistant/stream returned 200; answer streamed incrementally with a collapsible '思考结束' (thinking-complete) phase then markdown text. ChatGLM uses SSE event frames. Raw bytes need CDP/HAR.
captures.frame_separator: SSE event delimiter (\n\n between data: frames) — not byte-confirmed via taint-guard
captures.dom_render_structure: Vue SPA. Answer chain: div.answer > div.answer-content.flex1 > (div.assistant-name 'ChatGLM') + div.answer-content-wrap.text-advance-thinking-content + div.markdown-body.dr_margin_botttom (the rendered markdown answer). User turn labeled '访客_fbfb46' (guest). Thinking phase shown as '思考结束' collapsible.
captures.framework: Vue (data-v-app + #app mount + window.Vue present; NOT React/Next)

notes: Chinese site — did NOT log in (instruction). Anonymous/GUEST scope WORKS: GET /chatglm/mainchat-api/guest/chat_status gates guest mode; user shown as '访客_fbfb46' (Guest). GLM-5.1 answered the benign Korean prompt with a Korean greeting. Root chatglm.cn redirected to /main/alltoolsdetail (chat input present, as flagged in request). Supporting endpoints: /mainchat-api/conversation/recent_list, /conversation/title. Telemetry: analysis.chatglm.cn/bdms/p.gif. etap-bypassed clean baseline. Exact SSE frame bytes need CDP/HAR.
